name: Venison Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------------SHORTCAKE---------------------------------
2 cups Flour
2 teaspoons Baking powder
1/2 teaspoon Salt
4 tablespoons Shortening
2 and 3/4 cups Milk
Melted butter or margarine
Saute the bacon and onions until slightly browned. Add meat, salt, pepper,
and cook until browned. Add 2 tablespoons flour and blend. Add water,
mustard, and catsup. Bring to a brisk boil, stirring constantly.
For shortcake, sift flour, baking powder, and salt together twice. Cut in
shortening. Gradually add milk, mixing to soft dough. Turn out on a lightly
floured surface and knead slightly. Roll into a 1/4-inch thick rectangle and
cut with a floured 3-inch biscuit cutter. Place half the biscuits on baking
sheets, brushing with melted butter. Place remaining biscuits on top.
Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 12 to 15 minutes. To serve, split shortcakes
and pile meat mixture between halves.
